author: felipeblassioli
abstract: Guide writing, configuring, testing, and migrating Firebase Cloud Functions for Node.js (JavaScript/TypeScript). Distinguish v1 (deprecated) from v2 functions by import path. Use when writing a new Cloud Function, adding a trigger (HTTP, PubSub, Firestore), configuring environment or secrets, testing functions locally or with firebase-functions-test, or migrating v1 functions to v2. Do NOT use for client-side Firebase SDK integration, GCP services unrelated to Cloud Functions, or test-tier selection methodology (see tdd-classicist). ---
